message:
fix: worker-pool ID collision + query-do init race condition

- worker-pool: Date.now() in fan-out worker IDs can collide when multiple
  fan-outs execute within the same millisecond — use crypto.randomUUID()
- query-do: ensureInitialized() set initialized=true before async work
  completed, allowing concurrent callers to proceed before WASM was ready —
  now uses promise-based serialization so all callers await the same init
